name: Infinitrack Crab Crane
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>限</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>キャンサークレーン
desc: You can Tribute 1 EARTH Machine monster; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. You can banish 1 Machine monster from your GY; add 1 "Outrigger Extension" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Crab Crane" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 EARTH Machine monster; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. You can banish 1 Machine monster from your GY; add 1 "Outrigger Extension" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Crab Crane" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute 1 EARTH Machine monster; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. You can banish 1 Machine monster from your GY; add 1 "Outrigger Extension" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Crab Crane" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
